title: juncus orthophyllus
intro: Juncus orthophyllus, also known as the needle grass or thread grass, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. Traditionally, Juncus orthophyllus has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Juncus orthophyllus are believed to include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Juncus orthophyllus is often combined with other herbs and used in the form of teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
